textInfo.title: Elevated Non-HDL-Cholesterin (berechnet)
textInfo.detailedLaymanDescription: Your Non-HDL-Cholesterin (berechnet) level of 5.11 is outside the normal reference range. Your physician should evaluate this in the context of your overall clinical picture.
